---
title: "\'The Grey Woman\'"
---

## \'The Grey Woman\'
**Date:** 1889
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (Christmas 1889)

### Notes

The story was ascribed by CMY to \'Miss Benson\' the daughter of the Archbishop.  This probably means [[person:1858]Margaret Benson] rather than [[person:141]Mary Eleanor Benson].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
